title: targethud
description: this project addas a little gud customizable with alot that shows the players  health skin name armor dura and more
body:
### ----------------------------target hud------------------------------------
- adds
- a customizable target hud that shows everything you need
- gives a massive help donat want to calc the health of the player just use this it will show it
- wonder what their durabilty is just see it infront of you 
-  ---------------------------- what is in the target  hud------------------------------------- health  of the player
- armor dura of the player
- the skin head of the player
- name of the player
- the player main hand and off hand
- the player health in a health bar
